evals.prompt: How do I find email addresses for a company using Minelead?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Minelead domain search to find email addresses associated with a company

assertions.name: mentions_domain_search
assertions.description: Mentions domain search functionality or /search endpoint

assertions.name: mentions_web_ui_or_api
assertions.description: Mentions using the web UI or API to perform the search

assertions.name: mentions_credits_system
assertions.description: Mentions the credits system for search usage

evals.prompt: I want to send an email campaign to my leads in Minelead using multiple Gmail accounts
evals.expected_output: Guidance on setting up a Minelead email campaign with round-robin sending across multiple Gmail accounts

assertions.name: mentions_campaigns_feature
assertions.description: Mentions the campaigns feature for sending emails

assertions.name: mentions_round_robin
assertions.description: Mentions round-robin sending across multiple accounts

assertions.name: mentions_gmail_connection_and_recipients
assertions.description: Mentions connecting Gmail accounts and setting up recipient lists

evals.prompt: How do I use the Minelead API to verify an email address?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Minelead /validate API endpoint for email verification

assertions.name: mentions_validate_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions the /validate endpoint for email verification

assertions.name: mentions_response_fields
assertions.description: Mentions response fields such as status, MX records, or catch-all detection
